title: T-061 — ROOT: Gate screen components group (gate-screens prototype) (NPD-f)
prompt:
# T-061 — ROOT: Gate screen components group

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §17.6, §17.7 + UX prototypes/design/01-NPD-UX.md gate_checklist + advance_modal + approval_modal
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/gate-screens.jsx:106-616

## Type
T0-root — workflow descriptor only. NOT executable. Defines the group of slice tasks that together translate the Gate screen prototype components into production.

## Scope (this descriptor)
This task describes the Gate screen components group and points to atomic slice tasks. Do not implement any code under this task — implementation occurs in the slices listed below.

## Slice tasks under this root
- T-107: UI slice — GateChecklistPanel (gate-screens.jsx:106-258)
- T-108: UI slice — AdvanceGateModal (gate-screens.jsx:261-377)
- T-109: UI slice — GateApprovalModal (gate-screens.jsx:378-522)
- T-110: UI slice — ApprovalHistoryTimeline (gate-screens.jsx:525-616)
- T-111: WIRING — wire all four components into gate route page
- T-112: PARITY — browser screenshot parity vs prototype gate-screens.jsx:106-616

## Workflow contract
1. Slices T-107..T-110 execute in parallel; each ships its own RTL tests + component file.
2. T-111 executes after slices T-107..T-110 complete; integrates components into the gate route.
3. T-112 executes after T-111; runs Playwright parity vs the prototype and axe-violations check on modal open.

## Out of scope (root level)
- No production code lives at the root.
- Server actions, schema, and data-fetching contracts are defined in their own tasks (T-057, T-058).

## Acceptance (root)
- All listed slices closed.
- T-111 wiring task closed with all four components rendered in the route.
- T-112 parity task closed with Playwright screenshot + axe artifacts attached.
